DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AND INTERROGATORIES AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED-IN-PART AND DENIED-IN-PART. SPECIFICALLY, IT IS ORDERED THAT DEFENDANT ZENG PROVIDE COMPLETE, VERIFIED RESPONSES TO THE FOLLOWING DISCOVERY REQUESTS WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THE COURT'S WRITTEN ORDER: 1) PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS NOS 1, 2, 7, 13 AND 16; AND 2) PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORY NO. 17.1. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT DEFENDANT Q&H, LLC PROVIDE SEPARATE, COMPLETE, VERIFIED RESPONSES TO THE FOLLOWING DISCOVERY REQUESTS WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THE COURT'S WRITTEN ORDER: 1) PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS NOS 2, 7, 8 AND 13; AND 2) PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORY NO. 17.1. DEFENDANT Q&H'S RESPONSES MUST BE ON BEHALF OF Q&H; NOT ON BEHALF OF CO-DEFENDANT ZENG. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANA KRUZE; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admissions And Interrogatories And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joshua D. White, of Jones Clifford, Tel. 888.625.2251, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TANVEER ALI Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admissions And Interrogatories And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED-IN-PART and DENIED-IN-PART. Specifically, it is ordered that Defendant Zeng provide complete, verified responses to the following discovery requests within 10 days of notice of the court's written order: 1) Plaintiff's Request for Admissions Nos 1, 2, 7, 13 and 16; and 2) Plaintiff's Form Interrogatory No. 17.1. It is further ordered that Defendant Q&H, LLC provide separate, complete, verified responses to the following discovery requests within 10 days of notice of the court's written order: 1) Plaintiff's Request for Admissions Nos 2, 7, 8 and 13; and 2) Plaintiff's Form Interrogatory No. 17.1. Defendant Q&H's responses must be on behalf of Q&H; not on behalf of co-defendant Zeng. Plaintiff's motion for monetary sanctions is DENIED. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Diana Kruze; Clerk Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
